name: API Rate Limiting
description: Add rate limiting to an Express API: global limit (100 req/min per IP), authenticated user limit (1000 req/min), and endpoint-specific limits. Redis-backed for distributed deployments.

steps.description: Check existing middleware and Redis availability
Create globalLimiter (100/min), authLimiter (1000/min), and strictLimiter (10/min) using Redis store
Apply globalLimiter to all routes, authLimiter to authenticated routes
Apply strictLimiter to /auth/login and /auth/register to prevent brute force
Test that 101st request returns 429, headers contain X-RateLimit-* info

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Per-IP and per-user rate limiting with Redis-backed sliding window
